'''鈭歽-y-n''' ('''yayana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impalm|impalm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impalm|impalm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-y-n
|-
! Lemma
| yayana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yayanithi|yayanithi]] || [[word:yayaniji|yayaniji]] || [[word:yayanishi|yayanishi]] || [[word:yayani|yayani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayanuthuth|yayanuthuth]] || [[word:yayanujuj|yayanujuj]] || [[word:yayanushush|yayanushush]] || [[word:yayan|yayan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayanuthu|yayanuthu]] || [[word:yayanuju|yayanuju]] || [[word:yayanushu|yayanushu]] || [[word:yayanu|yayanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayanufuth|yayanufuth]] || [[word:yayanufuj|yayanufuj]] || [[word:yayanufush|yayanufush]] || [[word:yayanuf|yayanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yayanethe|yayanethe]] || [[word:yayaneje|yayaneje]] || [[word:yayaneshe|yayaneshe]] || [[word:yayane|yayane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayanothoth|yayanothoth]] || [[word:yayanojoj|yayanojoj]] || [[word:yayanoshosh|yayanoshosh]] || [[word:yayan|yayan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayanotho|yayanotho]] || [[word:yayanojo|yayanojo]] || [[word:yayanosho|yayanosho]] || [[word:yayano|yayano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayanofoth|yayanofoth]] || [[word:yayanofoj|yayanofoj]] || [[word:yayanofosh|yayanofosh]] || [[word:yayanof|yayanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yayan忙th忙|yayan忙th忙]] || [[word:yayan忙j忙|yayan忙j忙]] || [[word:yayan忙sh忙|yayan忙sh忙]] || [[word:yayan忙|yayan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayanathath|yayanathath]] || [[word:yayanajaj|yayanajaj]] || [[word:yayanashash|yayanashash]] || [[word:yayan|yayan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayanatha|yayanatha]] || [[word:yayanaja|yayanaja]] || [[word:yayanasha|yayanasha]] || [[word:yayana|yayana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayanafath|yayanafath]] || [[word:yayanafaj|yayanafaj]] || [[word:yayanafash|yayanafash]] || [[word:yayanaf|yayanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yayanasha|yayanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyayanasha|goyayanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyayanasha|gokiyayanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yayan眉sha|yayan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyayankn眉sha|goyayankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayan眉sha|gokiyayan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yayansh毛sha|yayansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyayanksh毛sha|goyayanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyayansh毛sha|gokiyayansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayanrosha|yayanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayankrosha|goyayankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayanrosha|gokiyayanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yayanmusha|yayanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayankmusha|goyayankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayanmusha|gokiyayanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yayansherasha|yayansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyayanksherasha|goyayanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyayansherasha|gokiyayansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yayangasha|yayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyayankngasha|goyayankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyayangasha|gokiyayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yayanyasha|yayanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyayankyasha|goyayankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyayanyasha|gokiyayanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yayanyamasha|yayanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyayankyamasha|goyayankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyayanyamasha|gokiyayanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yayan眉sh毛sha|yayan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyayankn眉sh毛sha|goyayankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyayan眉sh毛sha|gokiyayan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayan眉rosha|yayan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayankn眉rosha|goyayankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayan眉rosha|gokiyayan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayan眉musha|yayan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayankn眉musha|goyayankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayan眉musha|gokiyayan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yayansh毛n眉sha|yayansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyayanksh毛n眉sha|goyayanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayansh毛n眉sha|gokiyayansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayansh毛rosha|yayansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayanksh毛rosha|goyayanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayansh毛rosha|gokiyayansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayansh毛musha|yayansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayanksh毛musha|goyayanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayansh毛musha|gokiyayansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yayanron眉sha|yayanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyayankron眉sha|goyayankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayanron眉sha|gokiyayanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yayanrosh毛sha|yayanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyayankrosh毛sha|goyayankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyayanrosh毛sha|gokiyayanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayanromusha|yayanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayankromusha|goyayankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayanromusha|gokiyayanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yayanmun眉sha|yayanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyayankmun眉sha|goyayankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyayanmun眉sha|gokiyayanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yayanmush毛sha|yayanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyayankmush毛sha|goyayankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyayanmush毛sha|gokiyayanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yayanmurosha|yayanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyayankmurosha|goyayankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyayanmurosha|gokiyayanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yayan|yayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙y忙n|y忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyayan|hoyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙y忙n|hoy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyayan|hohoyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙y忙n|hohoy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yayan|n眉yayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙y忙n|n眉y忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yayan|n眉n眉yayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙y忙n|n眉n眉y忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yayan|n茂yayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙y忙n|n茂y忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yayan|n茂n茂yayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙y忙n|n茂n茂y忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyayan|luyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙y忙n|luy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyayan|luluyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙y忙n|luluy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyayan|liyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙y忙n|liy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyayan|liliyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙y忙n|liliy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyayan|koyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙y忙n|koy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyayan|kokoyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙y忙n|kokoy忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyayan|keyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙y忙n|key忙y忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyayan|kekeyayan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙y忙n|kekey忙y忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
